title: stachys × tarnensis
intro: Stachys × tarnensis, also known as Wood Betony, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Stachys byzantina and Stachys officinalis, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, Wood Betony has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve headaches, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues, thanks to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Wood Betony include its potential to alleviate anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support cardiovascular health. Wood Betony is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
